purpose: Project a safe, bounded conveyor run envelope path set from slice key, run date, run root, and allowed root.
mustDo: validate sliceKey as lowercase slug segments
validate runDate as yyyy/mm/dd path segments
project only deterministic run envelope paths
normalize path separators to forward slashes
verify every projected path stays under allowedRoot
completionPosture: This is a tiny SEJ language/conveyor infrastructure operation. It projects bounded run paths only; existing materialization and evidence primitives create run artifacts later.
